title: FarmERP South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: FarmERP South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the FarmERP South Asia Partners family as a Full Stack Developer in Navi Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FarmERP South Asia Partners:
FarmERP South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FarmERP South Asia Partners!
